name: DROPBOX, INC.
summary: Overview Dropbox, Inc. (the Company, we, or us) is the one place to keep life organized and keep work moving. We were founded in 2007 with a simple idea: Life would be a lot better if everyone could access their most important information anytime from any device. Weve largely accomplished that mission by building tools to help people work from anywhereand along the way we recognized that for most of our users, sharing and collaborating on the Dropbox, Inc. platform (Dropbox) was even more valuab...
